Tool 05 of 05

Are You Buying More Leads
Than You Can Convert?

Most companies scale marketing spend before fixing capacity. That's how money gets burned. Enter your team size and production rate - find out exactly how many calls you need and the maximum spend that makes sense.

Your Team & Production Numbers Capacity-first marketing math

Scaling spend before fixing capacity is how money gets burned. Get the number of leads your team can actually handle - then decide how much to spend on getting them.

Number of field technicians techs who run jobs
Jobs per tech per day on a typical busy day
Industry typical:HVAC: 3–5 · Roofing: 2–3 · Plumbing: 4–6
Working days per month across your whole team
Average job ticket avg revenue per completed job
$
Your close rate % of inbound calls that book
%
Industry average:28–38% · Top 25%: 50%+
Target utilization % of capacity you want to run at
%
Recommended:75–85% (leaves room for emergencies)
Capacity Plan Waiting for your numbers
📋

Most companies scale spend before fixing capacity. That's how money gets burned - you're paying for leads your team can't handle, and calls that came in aren't getting booked. Enter your team numbers to find the right spend ceiling.

to hit target utilization
